    • SBOM for R Package Repositories (renv + GitHub Actions)
  • Changelog

Compute sha256 hash of a file

lockfile_sha256.Rd

Uses openssl::sha256() when available (recommended for portability). If openssl is not installed, returns a sentinel string rather than erroring.

Usage

lockfile_sha256(path)

Developed by Michael Dougherty.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
